purpose: Phase 18 Offer Stack / Revenue Ladder Engine for Matrix Reprogrammed. This defines public offer routes that connect books, Amazon store paths, reader ladders, campaigns, share kits, download packs, feeds, trust pages, and evidence routes into clear buying journeys.
rules: Offer pages must never inflate evidence strength to sell books.
Every offer must include a trust route and a reader path.
Every offer must route to books or the Amazon store without hiding the evidence boundary.
Offer pages should explain who the route is for, what to read first, and where to go next.
Downloadable offer files are sales orientation assets, not private customer data.
The offer stack should guide readers from free trust assets to deeper book routes.

offers.title: Starter Library Offer
offers.label: First-time reader route
offers.summary: The entry offer for new readers: start with the book universe, trust boundaries, Black File starter pack, and Amazon store route.
offers.promise: A clean first route into the archive without getting lost.
steps: Open the Black File Starter Pack

offers.title: D.O.G The Architect Collector Offer
offers.label: Premium occult masterwork route
offers.summary: The premium D.O.G route for readers drawn to symbolic architecture, esoteric initiation, and the flagship collector volume.
offers.promise: The symbolic flagship route: deep reading, claim labels, and collector positioning.

offers.title: Intelligence Dossiers Offer
offers.label: Agency series route
offers.summary: The agency reader route for CIA, NSA, surveillance, declassified history, and intelligence network maps.
offers.promise: A guided route through agency history, maps, and book doors.

offers.title: Crime Dossiers Offer
offers.label: Crime network series route
offers.summary: The organized-crime reader route for cartels, mafia logistics, court records, sanctions, and crime-state overlap.
offers.promise: A reader route through crime systems, books, and evidence boundaries.

offers.title: Trust Before Darkness Offer
offers.label: Free credibility route
offers.summary: A free route that builds trust before selling: source hierarchy, claim labels, corrections, evidence vault, and trust/evidence pack.
offers.promise: Trust first, books second: the credibility route for skeptical readers.

offers.title: Full Archive Offer
offers.label: Everything route
offers.summary: The broad route for readers who want the whole system: book universe, sales ladder, campaigns, share center, feed center, and Amazon store.
offers.promise: The whole Matrix Reprogrammed archive in one guided sales route.
